chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP No.D-7618 of 2019 Date Order with signature of Judge(s) 1. For hearing of Misc. No.33597/2019. 2. For hearing of Main Case. 20.12.2024 Mr. Muhammad Adeel Awan, advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Azad Hussain, advocate holds brief for Mr. Bilal Bhatti, advocate for the respondent. Ms. Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General. Learned counsel for the petitioner seeks disposal in terms of the pronouncement made in Special Custom Reference Application No.340 of 2018 along with others, however, he concedes that the issue involved in this Petition has already been decided by virtue of the aforesaid Judgment passed in the aforesaid SCRAs. Let the judgment along with reasoning and rationale apply mutatis mutandis. The instant Petition stands disposed of along with pending applications. JUDGE JUDGE M.Khan
